examples: Like a flash of lightning, the meteor shot across the sky.
Now astronomers think it was a meteor that burned up high in the atmosphere.
Some geoscientists think that this catastrophe involved a meteor striking the earth.
Fifty thousand years ago, a meteor carrying trace amounts of silicone carbide crashed into present-day Arizona.
From here, must-stops include Meteor Crater and the Take It Easy town of Winslow.
